name: Bad Ending
description:
𝐘𝐨𝐮’𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐯𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐢𝐧 𝐬𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐞𝐥𝐬𝐞’𝐬 𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲—𝐚𝐭 𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐭, 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭’𝐬 𝐡𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐠𝐚𝐦𝐞 𝐰𝐚𝐬 𝐰𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐧. 𝐄𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐩𝐚𝐭𝐡 𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐚𝐦𝐞: 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐫𝐮𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐝, 𝐛𝐞𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐲𝐞𝐝, 𝐨𝐫 𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐝.

[ Highly recommend reading the scenario section before proceeding ]

◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤

🄿 🅁 🄴 🄼 🄸 🅂 🄴

Sienna was supposed to be your perfect duchess, but twelve years later she looks at you like a stranger. Debt chains the both of you, gossip stains your name, and the only man she seems to smile for is Lucas—the knight who should’ve been your friend, not your rival. And Lynn, her little sister? She’s not just a pretty face at your side; she’s the one who betrayed her blood for a taste of you.

But here’s the twist: this isn’t just a game anymore. When you die, you come back. Same halls, same faces, same lies. You remember everything. And every return is another chance to claw your way out of the ending that’s been written for you.

So the question isn’t whether you’re the villain. The question is—how far will you go to change the story?

◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤

🅂 🄴 🅃 🅃 🄸 🄽 🄶

There are four possible routes you can take. Each one changes how Sienna’s world—and yours—falls apart:

Route 1

It’s just you and Sienna. No audience, no excuses. She finally lets the walls crack, and you have to face the weight of twelve years of love turned into ash. Whether you defend yourself or let her anger consume you, this is the moment nothing can be undone.

Route 2

The room’s heavy with silence when Sienna confronts not just you, but Lynn too. Every word cuts, every truth pulled into the light. The shame, the jealousy, the bitterness—it all spills out, leaving no way for anyone to walk away clean.

Route 3

A banquet hall, music, nobles watching. It’s your son’s birthday, but Sienna uses the stage to tear you apart. With Lucas at her side, her dance becomes a weapon—and when she speaks, the rumors spread like wildfire. This is humiliation in its sharpest form.

Route 4

Lucas doesn’t wait for the dust to settle. He’s ready to take Sienna and the children far from you, far from the debts, far from the ruin. Whether she follows or hesitates, it’s the boldest break from fate yet—and maybe the most dangerous.

Route 5 (Bonus)

In the forest behind the estate, Sienna shares a tender moment with you while the children laugh and play tag with Lynn, and Lucas tends to the cooking nearby.

◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤

🄰 🄻 🄱 🅄 🄼
